_meta.author: RESOLUTE VA sprint hotfix
_meta.note: HOTFIX after post-apply web recheck: (1) Mark Warner is SEEKING 2026 reelection (WTOP 2025-12-02 announcement; GovTrack) — prior scorecard notes claiming retirement were STALE and this sprint wrongly set not_seeking_reelection. (2) Hung Cao is Acting Secretary of the Navy (confirmed Apr 2026) NOT a 2026 Senate candidate — prior scorecard + this sprint office rewrite were wrong. reset_unspecified false; hygiene only.

mark-warner.notes_append: [2026-07-18 HOTFIX] REVERTED erroneous not_seeking_reelection. HARD: Warner announced Dec 2 2025 he is running for a fourth Senate term (WTOP). GovTrack lists next reelection 2026 / serves until Jan 3 2027. Prior scorecard notes claiming 'RETIRING 2026 open seat' were STALE and must be ignored. candidacy_status restored to incumbent_seeking_reelection.

set.office: Acting U.S. Secretary of the Navy (assumed Apr 22, 2026 · former 2024 VA Senate nominee · not a 2026 Senate candidate)

hung-cao-senate-2026.notes_set: Hung Cao: retired U.S. Navy captain; 2022 R nominee VA-10 (lost); 2024 R nominee U.S. Senate VA (lost to Tim Kaine). [2026-07-18 HOTFIX] HARD: Confirmed Acting Secretary of the Navy Apr 18 2026, assumed office Apr 22 2026 (Wikipedia/Ballotpedia). NOT a 2026 U.S. Senate candidate. Prior scorecard + interim sprint text wrongly framed him as 2026 Senate contender 'vs Warner' or open-seat — corrected. Dens/scores remain uncited curated; full re-evidence deferred; status hygiene only.
